## Description
Circular progress visual for Enso UI.
## Installation
Install the package:

```bash
yarn add @enso-ui/progress-circle
```
## Features
- exports `ProgressCircle` as its public surface
- keeps the Bulma presentation layer separate from the renderless/stateful layer where applicable
## Usage
```vue
<script setup>
import ProgressCircle from '@enso-ui/progress-circle/src/ProgressCircle.vue';
</script>
```
## API
### `ProgressCircle`

Public export available from `./src/ProgressCircle.vue`.

Props:
- `progress`
- `backgroundStroke`
- `progressStroke`
- `textColor`
- `width`
## Depends On
- No additional Enso UI dependencies.
## Contributions
are welcome. Pull requests are great, but issues are good too.
Thank you to all the people who already contributed to Enso!
